hooks.command: jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty" | { read -r f; case "$f" in "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR"/data/*.json) cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/tools" && npm run build;; esac; }
jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty" | { read -r f; case "$f" in *data/core/terrain-layouts.json) cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && cargo run -p xtask -- bundle-data;; esac; }
